_meta.author: moazamtrade
_meta.title: Animated Generate Button (shadcn + Tailwind)
_meta.description: A reusable, accessible React button that mirrors the Uiverse “dexter-st” glow/flicker animation using Tailwind utilities and scoped CSS. It integrates with shadcn theme tokens, supports idle/active labels, a controllable generating state, and a customizable highlight hue for easy theming.
